title: USDC Attribute Spec Mapping Production Contract
format_neutral_rules: contracts/document-model-productions/attribute-spec.contract.json — the attribute spec field set (custom/variability/typeName required), listOp subfield rules, default-vs-typeName agreement, value-block sentinel semantics, and TimeSamples / Spline value-shape rules are pinned in the format-neutral production. This contract adds the USDC-specific mapping: Crate spec form 1 -> attribute spec, per-field name resolution, and per-field Crate value-representation type bindings.

storage_mapping.rule: A SPECS entry with form=1 produces an attribute spec at the property path resolved through PATHS. Authored fields come from the FIELDSETS group whose start is given by the SPECS entry's field_set_index. The token-name in FIELDS is the canonical document-model field name; alias resolution is a USDA grammar concern and does not appear in Crate.

field_resolution.custom: FIELDS token name 'custom'; value type 1 (bool) inlined. Defaults to false when absent.
field_resolution.variability: FIELDS token name 'variability'; value type 44 (Variability) inlined with payload encoding 0=varying, 1=uniform. Defaults to varying when absent.
field_resolution.typeName: FIELDS token name 'typeName'; value type 11 (token) inlined as a uint32 token index. Array typeNames (e.g. 'float[]') are stored as a single token with the array suffix embedded in the token text, consistent with USDA round-trip.
field_resolution.default: FIELDS token name 'default'; value type matches the attribute's declared typeName, decoded by usdc-value-decoder according to contracts/usdc-productions/crate-value-representations.contract.json#type_table_required_for_aousd_1_0_1. A ValueBlock (type 51) authored as the default stores a value-block sentinel.
field_resolution.connectionPaths: FIELDS token name 'connectionPaths'; value type 34 (PathListOp). Subfields decoded per crate-value-representations.contract.json#list_ops.
field_resolution.timeSamples: FIELDS token name 'timeSamples'; value type 46 (TimeSamples). Decoded by usdc-value-decoder as a native time->FieldValue map; storage must be a numeric-keyed native map, not string-keyed JSON. None-valued samples (ValueBlock type 51) decode to value-block sentinels.
field_resolution.spline: FIELDS token name 'spline'; value type 59 (Splines) at minor>=12. Encountering this type at minor<12 emits UnsupportedUsdcFeature per crate-value-representations.contract.json#feature_gated_types. No USDC spline golden cases are in scope for AOUSD 1.0.1.
field_resolution.allowedTokens: FIELDS token name 'allowedTokens'; value type 41 (TokenVector) offset-backed
field_resolution.customData: FIELDS token name 'customData'; value type 31 (dictionary) offset-backed
field_resolution.hidden: FIELDS token name 'hidden'; value type 1 (bool) inlined

storage_mapping.default_field_type_table_reference: The 'default' field's value-rep type id corresponds to typeName per crate-value-representations.contract.json#type_table_required_for_aousd_1_0_1. The mapping (typeName -> Crate type id) is: bool->1, uchar->2, int->3, uint->4, int64->5, uint64->6, half->7, float->8, double->9, string->10, token->11, asset->12, matrix2d/3d/4d->13/14/15, quatd/f/h->16/17/18, double2/float2/half2/int2->19/20/21/22, double3/float3/half3/int3->23/24/25/26, double4/float4/half4/int4->27/28/29/30. Arrays use the same type id with the Array flag set per crate-value-representations.contract.json#array_value_representations.

forbidden_field_enforcement.rule: Per document-model-productions/common-metadata.contract.json#spec_kind_field_admission, an attribute spec admits only shared + attribute_only + custom; any other field-name token is rejected (and must not be interned as an extension field). In the USDC encoding, this is enforced by the field-name token: a FIELDS entry whose token name is one of {payload, references, inheritPaths, specializes, variantSetNames, variantSelection, subLayers, relocates, layerRelocates, defaultPrim, framesPerSecond, timeCodesPerSecond, startTimeCode, endTimeCode, customLayerData, colorSpace, connectionChildren, permission, prefix, suffix, symmetricPeer, symmetryArguments, symmetryFunction} attached to a form-1 spec is a contract violation (colorSpace is AOUSD §7.6.4.3 out-of-scope; the remainder are §7.6.3.4 / §7.6.4.4 deprecated — all rejected under strict spec conformance). The parser must emit a MalformedUsdcSection diagnostic.
forbidden_field_enforcement.rationale: USDA enforces this via reserved-keyword rejection in the attribute metadata grammar. USDC needs the same enforcement at the field-name binding step because the binary format does not distinguish metadata contexts at write time.

laws: a Crate SPECS entry with form=1 produces exactly one attribute spec at the property path resolved through PATHS
variability is decoded from Crate type 44 with payload 0=varying, 1=uniform; the document-model storage is a native EnumVariability value, never a durable string
default value type must agree with typeName per the type_table mapping; a mismatched value-representation type id at the 'default' field produces a TypeMismatch diagnostic

TimeSamples (type 46) is in scope for USDC at all accepted Crate versions; the parser decodes the native time->FieldValue map. None-valued samples store value-block sentinels per document-model-productions/attribute-spec.contract.json#fields.timeSamples.
Splines (type 59) is version-gated at Crate minor>=12; encountering it at lower versions emits UnsupportedUsdcFeature
connectionPaths (FIELDS token) is decoded from PathListOp (type 34) with subfields per crate-value-representations.contract.json#list_ops
field-name tokens outside the attribute admitted set (document-model-productions/common-metadata.contract.json#spec_kind_field_admission) are rejected at FIELDS token binding time on form-1 specs
golden_groups: Crate form 1 specs decode to attribute specs at the expected property paths
custom / variability / typeName / default round-trip for scalar, vector, matrix, and array types
ValueBlock default decodes to a value-block sentinel
type mismatch diagnostic when default value-rep type id disagrees with typeName
TimeSamples (type 46) decode as native time->FieldValue map
connectionPaths (PathListOp) explicit / prepend / append / delete subfields
Splines (type 59) on a minor<12 fixture emits UnsupportedUsdcFeature
forbidden prim-only / layer-only field names attached to form-1 spec emit MalformedUsdcSection
